_comment: Fast per-PR mutation lane over the small, pure faithfulness counter. It is the only mutation score enforced automatically; broad configs are opt-in diagnostics. Gates via thresholds.break.
thresholds_comment: Mutates the structural-count counter (countStructuralElements + faithfulnessWarning + isDrop). Measured 97.01% (130/134) on 2026-07-14 after valid State-region and ER cases exposed real gaps and after rebasing the Radar family; four opaque/default mutants are equivalent or unreachable. break=90 fails a material regression without turning the score into a universal policy.
